falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes below the 200-day moving average by more than 2% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below key support invalidates the bottom pattern and suggests continued bearish momentum, contradicting the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, signaling a potential market top rather than the anticipated bottom, directly refuting the current pattern match.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Index rises above 30 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX spike above 30 reflects heightened volatility and fear, contradicting the stability implied by the bottom pattern and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
